rankings.reason: Best alignment with the futuristic 2050 theme, offering a comprehensive and professional vision of high-tech airport operations.
Strong focus on user-centric digital integration, though it feels more like an incremental improvement than a 2050 vision.
Includes creative robotic service ideas, but lacks the sophisticated, professional tone required for a world-renowned design team.
Completely irrelevant to the airport design prompt; it provides travel advice for Iceland instead of futuristic airport concepts.
